entities.name: Vrijen Attawar
entities.context: Founder of Careerspan; product owner and steward of narrative, customers, and cash runway. Feeling pressure to make hard calls about people and focus.

entities.name: Vibe
entities.context: Product that V wants to make attractive and credible enough to be sold, not merely survive standalone.

entities.name: Ilya
entities.context: Collaborator whose work V worries is over-fitted to pricing permutations and under-fitted to actual users and leads.

relationships.context: Vrijen Attawar is founder and product owner of Careerspan.
V stewards Vibe and wants to position it as attractive for sale rather than standalone survival.
Ilya is a collaborator whose work V critiques as over-fitted to pricing and under-fitted to users.
